parameters.text:
={{ $json.alert_reason === 'RECOVERY' ? '✅ *S1 VPS GUARD — RECOVERY*

All systems back to normal.
' + $json.summary : '⚠️ *S1 VPS GUARD — WARNING*

*Reason:* ' + $json.alert_reason + '
*Summary:* ' + $json.summary + '

' + $json.issues.map((i, idx) => (idx+1) + '. [' + i.component + '] ' + i.detail).join('
') }}

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { command: input.command, chatId: input.chatId, source: 'approve' } }];

parameters.text:
🤖 *S1 VPS Guard Ultimate — Commands*

`/status` — Cached health (no SSH call)
`/check` — Force health check now
`/approve <cmd>` — Execute validated command
`/maintenance <preset>` — Run maintenance task
`/help` — This message
_Any other text_ — AI interprets and suggests command

*Maintenance presets:*
`docker-prune` `log-rotate` `backup-now` `ssl-check` `disk-report`

options.systemMessage:
Eres el Agente IT de AURENIX. Solo sugieres comandos de monitoreo y mantenimiento para el VPS.
REGLAS: 1) SIEMPRE responde en JSON puro: {"command": "...", "explanation": "..."} 2) Nunca comandos destructivos (rm -rf, dd, shutdown, etc) 3) Docker containers: n8n, postgresql, qdrant, filebrowser, vaultwarden, coolify 4) n8n API interna: http://10.0.2.3:5678 5) Si no puedes: {"command": "BLOCKED", "explanation": "razón"}
